Specialist cluster

Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Diagnose APN, Private DNS, VoLTE, Wi-Fi calling, dual-SIM, VPN, and other network settings that basic restarts do not resolve.

Browse guidesAll smartphone guides
Separate the terminology

Check protocol, setting, and plan requirements independently.

Record original values

Save settings and errors so changes can be reversed.

Retest one variable

Keep test conditions constant to preserve causality.

Detailed guides

10 guides

Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Android Private DNS Not Working: Advanced Troubleshooting

Diagnose Private DNS hostnames that will not save, break connectivity, or fail only on certain Wi-Fi networks by separating provider, VPN, certificate, and network restrictions.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Phone APN Settings Not Saving or Working

Fix APN profiles that do not save or provide data even when 4G or 5G appears by checking APN type, authentication, MCC/MNC, and carrier provisioning.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Why 5G Is Not Showing on a 5G Phone

Diagnose a 5G-capable phone that stays on LTE by checking bands, NSA versus SA, power settings, SIM provisioning, and local coverage.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Mobile Data Drops During Calls: VoLTE Checks

When mobile data slows or stops during calls, check VoLTE, IMS registration, the selected voice line, and carrier support.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Wi-Fi Calling Not Activating or Completing Calls

Troubleshoot missing Wi-Fi Calling controls, activation failures, and calls that will not complete by checking plan eligibility, emergency address, router behavior, and VPNs.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Public Wi-Fi Login Page Not Opening

Open a captive portal that does not appear on hotel, airport, or cafe Wi-Fi by checking HTTPS redirection, Private DNS, VPN, randomized MAC, and expired sessions.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Randomized MAC Address Causing Wi-Fi Problems

Resolve Wi-Fi registration failures caused by randomized MAC or private addresses while preserving privacy where fixed device registration is not required.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Dual-SIM Phone Uses the Wrong Line

Stop a dual-SIM phone from using the wrong line for calls, texts, or data by checking defaults, per-contact choices, automatic switching, and roaming.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

Roaming Shows Signal but Mobile Data Does Not Work

When roaming shows signal but no data, verify data roaming, partner networks, APN, spending limits, and manual network selection.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Advanced Network and Carrier Settings

VPN Connected but No Internet on a Phone

Diagnose a phone VPN that reports connected but has no internet by checking DNS, always-on VPN, kill switch, MTU, protocol, and competing VPN profiles.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
